title: Admin dashboard: roster view + counting fixes
items: User Roster — collapsed loyal, drifting, recent signups, and recent logins into one table showing every user with a color-coded health pill (active / slipping / drifted / never). Sorted by most recent login so the top is 'who's using it now' and the bottom is 'who to email today'
Fixed recipe count — the 3 auto-seeded starter recipes (Overnight Oatmeal, Spaghetti, Chicken & Bean Burrito) no longer count toward a user's 'own recipes' metric or the activation funnel

Fixed grocery count — was counting Object.keys() on the groceries wrapper object, giving every user the same bogus number. Now sums real user-added items only (staples + flex + ad-hoc + category), and excludes the 3 default staples and 3 default flex items
Fixed meals-planned count — only counts meal plan slots that are actually filled, not empty keys left over from clears
Funnel steps renamed to be explicit: 'Added own recipe', 'Planned a meal', 'Added grocery items'
Changelog collapsed into an accordion with only the latest entry open, to save vertical space
Chart fixes — gradient now matches canvas height, charts properly destroy on Refresh (no memory leak), line-chart x-axis shows M/D instead of ISO strings, tooltip shows full day-of-week
Retention card shows '—' when no users are eligible yet (instead of a misleading 0%)

title: Admin dashboard: honest login metrics
items: Login-based activity — 'active' KPIs now come from real auth.sessions data instead of data-save timestamps, so we can see who's actually opening the app
New KPIs — Logged in today / 7d / 30d, total logins (30d), and a logins-per-day trend chart
Activation funnel — visualizes drop-off from Signed up → Logged in → Onboarded → Created recipe → Assigned meal → Built groceries
Drifting users list — surfaces users who signed up ≥7 days ago but haven't logged in in the last week
Loyal users table — ranks by distinct login days, replacing the old 'top users by snapshots' table
Recent logins feed — alongside Recent signups, see who's been in lately
Fixed Onboarded count — now requires firstRunComplete === true instead of any non-empty onboarding object
Renamed 'snapshots' to 'auto-backups' to make clear these are data-loss safety copies, not engagement signals

title: Admin dashboard launched
items: New `/admin.html` page — branded to match the web app
Read-only aggregate stats endpoint at `/.netlify/functions/admin-stats` (service-role, admin-gated)
KPIs: total users, new 7/30d, active 1/7/30d, engagement proxies, feature usage, retention, top users, recent signups
Signups-per-day and active-users-per-day charts (30d)
Changelog surfaced on dashboard, sourced from `changelog.json` (this file)
Owner account (hellmanskitchen@gmail.com) excluded from all metrics

title: Redesigned startup guide
items: Onboarding split into one-time Setup and repeating Weekly Workflow phases
Every step now has 2–3 sentences explaining what to do, why it matters, and how long it takes
Navigation fix — the Next button after assigning meals now always appears so you can move straight to your grocery list
Smarter grocery hints — parmesan/feta show 'container' instead of 'bag', berries show container sizes, small milk amounts no longer show unnecessary conversions

title: Data loss fix + new recipe tools
items: ⚠️ Critical fix — bug that could wipe meal plans on refresh is resolved, with an automatic backup system in place
Breakfast / Lunch / Dinner tags — tag recipes by meal time for easier filtering
Edit any library recipe — customize ingredients and notes on built-in recipes without adding them to your menu first
Custom grocery items per category — add your own staples to any grocery category
Settings moved to footer for a cleaner header
Home screen shortcut fix — 'Add to Home Screen' now stays in sync with the browser version
